C0900C_RCALL_STF_NAME_CD C0900C_RCALL_STF_NAME_CD C0900C Staff Assessment of Mental Status - Recalls Staff Name Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indentifies whether or not the resident was able to recall staff names and faces. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
